Important Dates

All times are in Anywhere on Earth (AoE) time zone. The submission site of each track will open approximately four weeks before its submission deadline.

  • BlueSky
  • Instagram

Welcome to CHI 2026 in Barcelona!

The ACM (Association for Computing Machinery) CHI conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems is the leading international conference on Human-Computer Interaction. CHI 2026 will take place in Barcelona at the Centre de Convencions Internacional de Barcelona.

Register Now

CHI 2026 is currently at capacity. No new registrations are available.

See the Schedule-at-a-Glance
See the Full Program
Travel Visa FAQ

Latest Posts

  • Special Recognition for Sustainable Practices Winners & Runners-Up2026-04-15
  • Insights Into the Paper Track Reviewing2026-04-14
  • Help Save WiFi with Low Data Mode!2026-04-06

More posts…

Conference Program

In a newly refactored program, six submission areas allow for a plurality of submission types.

Papers

Long and short archival academic work from design to systems, from qualitative to quantitative and everything in between.

Posters

Late breaking works and other interesting shorter presentations of ideas and findings.

Interactive Demos

Innovative, creative, and fun exhibitions of research and technology in action.

Panels

Panels interactive expert discussion led discourse with audience questions, endorsements, and rebuttals.

Workshops

Focused sessions on a central theme of research: established or emerging.

Meetups

Discussions, birds-of-a-feather, and meet-and-greet events to foster community and conversations.

“Creant el demà junts.”
